title: Peacefull farmer
description: This is a modpack that makes minecraft just about farming and is very relaxing
body:
🪴 Description

Welcome to Peaceful Farmer, a calm and cozy Minecraft experience built for players who love farming, crafting, and relaxing instead of fighting.
Forget monsters — this world is about growth, creativity, and peaceful living. Build your dream farm, trade with villagers, raise animals, and watch the seasons change while you relax to the sound of nature.
